Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that eventually lead to 'Completed + In Call' (directly or indirectly)
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' in variants that end with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' relative to 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Number of cases where 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs more than once before reaching 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants containing 'Accepted + In Progress' that do not include any 'Accepted + Wait' type activity before 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all cases where 'Accepted + Wait' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' as the first activity in a case
Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' executions that are part of high-frequency variants ending in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Ratio of 'Accepted + In Progress' to 'Completed + Resolved' across all traces
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' events occurring in cases that never reach 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' does not occur

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities followed directly by another 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' in cases with impact level 'High' that result in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of all 'Completed + In Call' instances that are immediately preceded by 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average number of 'Accepted + In Progress' occurrences per case in variants that include 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that occur after 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and before 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Number of distinct variants where 'Accepted + In Progress' appears at least twice before 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of total activity executions represented by 'Accepted + In Progress' in cases that end with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'
